description: Smoke-test / throwaway NPC: idle + one directional walk cycle, pixel mode, 3 imagegen jobs.

states.name: idle
states.action: Calm idle loop: subtle breathing, a tiny blink, and a very small body bob; essentially the same pose and facing in every frame.
requirements: Keep the character in the same pose, facing direction, silhouette, and palette across all 4 frames.
The loop must still show visible micro-variation; do not repeat effectively identical copies.
Do not show walking, attacking, or any large gesture.
Feet or base anchor should stay planted or nearly planted.
The first and last frames should be visually close so the loop does not pop.

states.name: walk-right
states.action: Rightward walk cycle: alternating stride through body and limb poses only.
requirements: The row must unmistakably face and travel right.
The stride must visibly alternate across the 6 frames instead of repeating one nearly static pose.
Do not draw speed lines, dust clouds, floor shadows, motion trails, or detached motion effects.
